name: How long till I settle a respiratory comp claim in Boise?
description: Months for approval, years if appealed; average 6-18 mos.

mainEntity.name: How long till I settle a respiratory comp claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Months for approval, years if appealed; average 6-18 mos.
acceptedAnswer.description: **3-12 months for simple; 1-3 years if litigated or latent.** Depends on medicals, disputes[2]. Key factors: Quick diagnosis speeds; appeals delay; med-only fast. Idaho panels add time. Push insurer for status. Lawyer settles 80% pre-hearing.
